docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED OWNER, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTILLO, JESSICA , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 114 BUCARELI DRIVE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94132, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 76348442)
